steps.title: Match the input
steps.content:
The rule gives $f(cx)=x-7$. To use $f(3)$, set the input $cx$ equal to $3$.
$$cx=3$$
$$x=\frac{3}{c}$$

steps.title: Use the given output
steps.content:
Substitute $x=\frac{3}{c}$ into the rule, then use $f(3)=31$.
$$31=\frac{3}{c}-7$$

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content:
Add $7$ and solve for $c$.
$$38=\frac{3}{c}$$
$$38c=3$$
The answer is 3/38.
